query:
INSERT INTO `otelmsDailyReports` (
  `reportDate`,
  `checkIns`,
  `checkOuts`,
  `cancellations`,
  `totalRevenue`,
  `adr`,
  `occupancyRate`,
  `revPAR`,
  `totalGuests`,
  `totalChildren`,
  `roomsOccupied`,
  `carsParked`,
  `channelData`,
  `emailId`,
  `rawContent`
) VALUES (
  '2025-11-29 00:00:00',
  10,
  5,
  22,
  153984,
  3581,
  6000,
  2139,
  98,
  0,
  44,
  0,
  '{"Direct": {"count": 43, "revenue": 1113258}, "Booking": {"count": 1, "revenue": 100630}, "Expedia": {"count": 4, "revenue": 77040}}',
  'otelms-2025-11-29',
  'დღიური ანგარიში 29/11/2025 - შესვლა: 10, გასვლა: 5, გაუქმებები: 22'
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  `checkIns` = VALUES(`checkIns`),
  `checkOuts` = VALUES(`checkOuts`),
  `cancellations` = VALUES(`cancellations`),
  `totalRevenue` = VALUES(`totalRevenue`),
  `adr` = VALUES(`adr`),
  `occupancyRate` = VALUES(`occupancyRate`),
  `revPAR` = VALUES(`revPAR`),
  `totalGuests` = VALUES(`totalGuests`),
  `totalChildren` = VALUES(`totalChildren`),
  `roomsOccupied` = VALUES(`roomsOccupied`),
  `carsParked` = VALUES(`carsParked`),
  `channelData` = VALUES(`channelData`),
  `updatedAt` = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
